title: viola × paxiana
intro: Viola × paxiana, also known as the viola hybrid, is a cross between Viola riviniana and Viola riviniana subsp. paxiana, and is a type of flowering plant in the violet family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Viola × paxiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Viola × paxiana can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
